headline: How The Ferguson (FERG) Investment Narrative Is Shifting With New Targets And Valuation Assumptions
summary: Ferguson Enterprises now sits on an updated modeled fair value of US$276.55 per share, compared with a prior US$261.36, giving investors fresh context for how the stock is being framed in recent research. Much of this shift lines up with a wave of higher analyst price targets following Q4 results, Ferguson’s non residential exposure, and management’s medium term guidance, even as some research still flags end market and execution risks. As you read on, you will see how these moving targets...
